name: Beacon Academy

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Pegangsaan Dua No. 66, Kelapa Gading, Jakarta Utara 14250, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Newer international school in BSD. American curriculum with AP options. Modern campus, growing community. Mid-range fees for Greater Jakarta.
paragraphs: Newer international school in BSD. American curriculum with AP options. Modern campus, growing community. Mid-range fees for Greater Jakarta.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$6.8K – US$7.5K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Key results: IB Average 32, IB Pass Rate 91%.
Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Purpose-built campus on 2.3 hectares, 514-seat Beacon Theatre, Football pitch, Gymnasium, Semi-indoor swimming pool.

metaDescription: Beacon Academy (North Jakarta). Newer international school in BSD. American curriculum with AP options. Modern campus, growing community. Mid-range fees for Greater Jakarta…
